sub_goals.sub_goal: Build the selection + presentation module: haversine distance, pick the single closest store, render result card with name/address/distance and an external directions hand-off link; render empty/error states.

acceptance_verification.evidence: selectClosest computes haversineMeters for every store and keeps the minimum-distance record.
renderResultCard appends cls-card-name, cls-card-address, and cls-card-distance (miles + km).
Two anchor elements with href to openstreetmap.org/directions and google.com/maps/dir prefilled with the store's lat,lon; target=_blank.
renderMessageState renders a human-readable headline+detail box for status 'error' and for 'empty'/no-stores; container never left blank.
Module contains only haversine maths and link generation — no routing/turn-by-turn engine.

contract_verification.evidence: Consumes the {status,stores,message} lookup result; renders empty/error when status!=ok or stores empty.
Uses userLocation.lat/lon as the distance reference and userLocation.label as display context.
